description: Asana is a web and mobile application designed to help teams organize, track, and manage their work.
self_serve: Yes, users can sign up for free or paid plans directly via the website.
api_surface: RESTful API with JSON payloads, supporting CRUD operations on tasks, projects, teams, users, and more. Includes SDKs for multiple languages.
buildability: High – well-documented API, SDKs, and clear rate limits.
main_blocker: Rate limiting (150 requests/min per user) and the need for OAuth flow for most integrations.
